title: Mail Transport Policy Hardening Gap
description: Mail infrastructure was identified, but transport hardening controls such as MTA-STS or TLS-RPT appear incomplete.
impact: Missing mail transport protections can reduce visibility into downgrade issues and weaken secure-mail delivery assurance.
likelihood: Medium because impact depends on how the organization sends and receives mail over TLS.
recommendations: Publish and validate MTA-STS and TLS-RPT where mail infrastructure is internet-facing.
Review MX exposure and ensure transport security aligns with mail policy requirements.
Monitor mail delivery reporting for downgrade and TLS failures.
